orchestratorOverride: Scrutiny reviewer incorrectly flagged cross-surface-end-to-end as bypassing ISR. Investigation confirmed: (1) apps/api/src/http/workspace/services/documents.service.ts calls revalidatePublicDocumentPath() after publish, which POSTs to DOCS_APP_URL/api/revalidate; (2) apps/docs/src/app/api/revalidate/route.ts exists and calls Next.js revalidatePath(); (3) export const revalidate=60 is present in page.tsx. ISR was implemented in docs-ssr-upgrade. The cross-surface worker additionally set staleTime=0 on client queries — an enhancement, not a bypass.

appliedUpdates.description: Added -NoProfile to powershell commands to prevent PSReadLine initialization noise/errors on Windows that break service shutdown scripts.
Documented that GET /api/public/spaces is missing (requiring mock fallbacks) and that multiple default versions might exist for a space.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a fallback policy for handling pre-existing global lint failures (e.g. scoping to changed files) so workers are not blocked by unrelated codebase lint errors.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reported in docs-ssr-upgrade and docs-msw-api-fallback features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the skill to formally bless/guide writing a temporary Playwright script as a valid fallback for 'manual verification' when the agent-browser tool is unavailable.
Clarify that payload adaptation is required for public endpoints when building fallbacks, as GET /api/public/* structures differ from the offline MSW mocks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker noted this missing documentation during docs-msw-api-fallback.
